name: small-known-pr-pilot
description: Small calibration corpus for comparing reviewer overlap, useful findings, and noise before promoting informational lanes.

truth.notes: A merged/control PR that should not produce blocking findings.

corpus.notes: Replace with a recent merged PR whose final outcome is known.

truth.notes: A seeded or historical blocker that reviewers should catch.

expected_findings.summary: Seeded bug description used for adjudication.

corpus.notes: Seeded-bug entries make catch rate measurable. Keep the seed branch and base ref available so local CLI lanes can reproduce the same diff.

expected_findings.summary: Seeded auth or secret-handling bug expected to block merge.

corpus.notes: Use for token leakage, auth-state drift, RLS, or permission-boundary calibration.

expected_findings.summary: Seeded runtime setup bug expected to be caught by package/runtime lenses.

corpus.notes: Use for Python version, CLI auth, subprocess isolation, package extraction, or artifact durability calibration.

expected_findings.summary: Seeded privacy bug where auth probe output is persisted in shareable reports.

corpus.notes: Use for output-preview redaction, metrics trust, value report, and lane policy calibration.
